root.name: Config
root.title: Server Configuration
root.desc:
Server configuration for the server scripts
Changing pages or clicking the save button saves the current page,
pushing escape exits without saving the current page.

testText2.name: Cool Text
testText2.default:
some default text...
and some more...

serverNameColored.name: Server name colored
serverNameColored.desc: Name of the server with color in minimessage format, shown in the player list

motd.name: MOTD
motd.desc: Message of the day shown on the server list, in minimessage format

resourcePackURL.name: Resource pack URL
resourcePackURL.desc:
Direct URL to the server resource pack zip
Requires a script reload to update and find file hash

logDebug.name: Log debug
logDebug.desc: Whether debug messages should be visible in console

loreColor.name: Lore color
loreColor.desc: Color of plain text in item descriptions, in minimessage format

loreAccentColor.name: Lore accent color
loreAccentColor.desc: Color of accented text in item descriptions, in minimessage format

protectFromOwner.name: Protect from owner
protectFromOwner.desc: Pets cannot be damaged by their owner except while sneaking

forgetTarget.name: Forget target
forgetTarget.desc: Sitting down a pet will make it forget its target

infiniteTrading.name: Infinite trading
infiniteTrading.desc:
Villager trades have infinite stock and no raising demand.
When disabled, previously interacted with villagers will
still have (virtually) infinite trades

sharedCuring.name: Shared curing
sharedCuring.desc:
Make it so villagers only have to be cured once for all players to recieve the discount.
When disabled, only the last player to interact with the villager will have the cure discount

rerollTradesItem.name: Reroll trades item
rerollTradesItem.desc:
Use this item to reroll a villager's trades.
Supports custom item ids. Blank or invalid item to disable

forgetJobDistance.name: Forget far-away workstations
forgetJobDistance.desc:
Force villagers to forget job sites that are this many blocks away.
0 to disable

dismounting.name: Dismounting
dismounting.desc: Interact with a mob while sneaking to make it dismount a boat or minecart

shearDiffusing.name: Shear diffusing
shearDiffusing.desc: Allow shears to diffuse TNT and TNT minecarts

flintAndSteelIgniting.name: Flint and steel igniting
flintAndSteelIgniting.desc: Allow flint and steel to directly ignite mobs

betterBonemeal.name: Better bonemeal
betterBonemeal.desc: Allow bonemeal to be used on the following blocks: sugar cane, cactus, nether wart, pumpkins, melons, chorus flower, and small flowers (excluding wither roses and torchflowers)

dyeMore.name: Dye more
dyeMore.desc: Allow dye to be applied to wool, wool carpets, shulker boxes, and live shulkers

placeBlocks.name: Place blocks
placeBlocks.desc: Allow dispensers to place any block

milkMobs.name: Milk mobs
milkMobs.desc:
Allow dispensers to milk cows, mooshrooms, and goats with buckets.
Doesn't support milking stew from mooshrooms

disableNetherPortals.name: Disable nether portals
disableNetherPortals.desc: Prevent traveling to the nether through nether portals

disableEndPortals.name: Disable end portals
disableEndPortals.desc: Prevent traveling to the end through end portals

tablistHealth.name: Show health in tablist
tablistHealth.desc: Players' health will show in tablist as a colored heart

protectDeathLoot.name: Protect death loot
protectDeathLoot.desc:
Player death loot will glow and be protected from all sources.
Changing this setting will not affect previously dropped items

elytraBouncing.name: Elytra bouncing
elytraBouncing.desc: Prevent jumping off the ground while gliding with elytra stopping you from gliding

timeUntilRepair.name: Time until repair
timeUntilRepair.desc: Seconds since a block was last mined before its break progress begins repairing

repairSpeed.name: Repair speed
repairSpeed.desc: Seconds to fully repair a block once repairing begins

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.desc: Enable custom chat and other functionality in this tab

colorableChat.name: Colorable chat
colorableChat.desc: Whether legacy color codes using '&' will be formatted in chat

displayHeldItem.name: Display held item
displayHeldItem.desc: Whether '[item]' should be replaced with the player's held item

joinLeaveMessages.name: Join/leave messages
joinLeaveMessages.desc: Enable custom format for join and leave messages

deathMessages.name: Death messages
deathMessages.desc:
Enable custom format for death messages
Doesn't work for pets

advancements.name: Advancements
advancements.desc: Enable custom format for advancement messages

linkChannel.name: Link channel
linkChannel.desc: ID of the Discord channel that is used for chat link. Set to a non-integer or empty string to disable

execEnabled.name: /exec enabled
execEnabled.desc: Whether the Discord command /exec is enabled. It allows you to remotely execute Skript code. Configure allowed users with discord.execUsers

execUsers.name: /exec users
execUsers.desc: Comma separated list of IDs of the users who can use /exec on Discord. Requires discord.execEnabled to be true

inviteUrl.name: Invite url
inviteUrl.desc: ID part of the invite url to the Discord, used in /discord

mcToDiscord.name: Minecraft > Discord
mcToDiscord.desc: Whether messages are sent from Minecraft to Discord

discordToMc.name: Discord > Minecraft
discordToMc.desc: Whether messages are sent from Discord to Minecraft

playerChats.name: Player chats
playerChats.desc: Whether player chat messages are sent to the Discord channel

joinLeaveMessages.name: Join/leave messages
joinLeaveMessages.desc: Whether player join and leave messages are sent to the Discord channel

deathMessages.name: Death messages
deathMessages.desc: Whether player death messages are sent to the Discord channel

advancementMessages.name: Advancement messages
advancementMessages.desc: Whether advancement messages are sent to the Discord channel

nbs.name: Custom Songs
nbs.desc: Settings for the nbs song system

songFolder.name: Song folder
songFolder.desc: Folder relative to the server root where song files are uploaded to and read from

uploadingRequireOp.name: Only OPs can upload
uploadingRequireOp.desc: Only allow server operators to upload songs

uploadingRequireLink.name: Only linked users can upload
uploadingRequireLink.desc: Only allow users who have linked their Discord account to upload songs

clearOldSongs.name: Clear old songs
clearOldSongs.desc: Delete songs that haven't been played for 30 days when the server starts
